DEADLINE: the afternoon storm clouds rolling in
DEADLINE_SIGN: the darkening clouds gathering over the peak
Q1_PLIGHT: stranded on a high boulder ledge
Q1_METHOD: coax her onto a stone and lower her
Q1_ATTEMPT1: toss a handful of grass up to her
Q1_ATTEMPT2: climb up and carry her down himself
Q2_PLIGHT: trapped in a shrinking puddle of melting snow
Q2_METHOD: scoop her up gently in the satchel
Q2_ATTEMPT1: try to catch her with his bare hands
Q2_ATTEMPT2: blow her gently toward the flowers
Q3_PLIGHT: tangled up in twisting wildflower vines
Q3_HOME: the burrow beneath the old pine
Q3_METHOD: loosen one vine at a time, slowly
Q3_ATTEMPT1: give the vines one quick pull
Q3_ATTEMPT2: hold out a stick for him to grab
Q4_PLIGHT: stranded far up a sunny dry boulder
Q4_HOME: her mossy log down the slope
Q4_METHOD: offer her a slow ride on his hand
Q4_ATTEMPT1: roll her along like a tiny wheel
Q4_ATTEMPT2: cheer her on to move faster
Q4_SIGN: something tiny glinting in the sunshine
BONUS1_FIND: a chipmunk in a curled leaf nest
BONUS2_FIND: a smooth stone striped like a rainbow
SETBACK2_PRIZE: The Snail Rides the Runoff Home
